differentials.name: Pulmonary agenesis =  complete absence of a lobe + its bronchus
differentials.raw: Pulmonary agenesis =  complete absence of a lobe + its bronchus

differentials.name: Pulmonary aplasia =  rudimentary bronchus ending in blind pouch + absence of parenchyma + vessels
differentials.raw: Pulmonary aplasia =  rudimentary bronchus ending in blind pouch + absence of parenchyma + vessels

differentials.name: Pulmonary hypoplasia =  completely formed but congenitally small bronchus with rudimentary parenchyma + small vessels
differentials.raw: Pulmonary hypoplasia =  completely formed but congenitally small bronchus with rudimentary parenchyma + small vessels

differentials.name: Oligohydramnios
differentials.raw: Oligohydramnios (renal agenesis, bilateral cystic renal disease, obstructive uropathy, premature rupture of membranes)

differentials.name: Thoracic bone dysplasia: Ellis-van Creveld, Jeune, thanatophoric dystrophy, severe achondroplasia
differentials.raw: Thoracic bone dysplasia: Ellis-van Creveld, Jeune, thanatophoric dystrophy, severe achondroplasia

context: =  collective name for congenital underdevelopment of one / more lobes of a lung separated into 3 forms: CT: √  missing bronchus + lobe(s) Incidence:   1÷10,000; R÷L = 1÷1 CT: √  absence of ipsilateral pulmonary artery √  bronchus terminates in dilated blind pouch √  absence of ipsilateral pulmonary tissue Developmental causes: resulting in intrauterine compression of chest (a)  Idiopathic (rare) (b)  Extrathoracic compression (= Potter syndrome)
